---
title: "Welcome!"
image: "photo.jpg"

about: 
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/olena-bogdan-b056391bb/"
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/olenabg03"
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:olenabg@stanford.edu"
    - text: CV
      url: "resume.pdf"
---
